title: schoenocaulon tenorioi
intro: Schoenocaulon tenorioi, also known as Tenorio's shoestring fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoenocaulon tenorioi include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the roots or rhizomes in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
